category_sources: source_facts.description says cargo-deny is a Cargo plugin for linting dependencies.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo and source_facts.homepage point to the official Embark Studios GitHub repository; the project publishes official documentation on EmbarkStudios GitHub Pages with the README as repository documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions dependency linting; dependency linting commonly covers license and security policy for Cargo projects.
